text:
~ Testing & QA
Dev apps: https://cloud.mongodb.com/v2 5dfa7b09d5ec134c607cc57e#/clusters
Example apps for testing:
• Dev
• Triggers: Application-0
• GraphQL + HTTPS endpoints + Data API: Application-0
• Sync: TestTKSync82
• Hosting + HTTPS endpoints + Data API: AppWithHosting
• HTTPS endpoints: ApplicationWithHTTPSEndpoints
• QA
• Hosting + GraphQL: WithHosting
• Hosting: Application-O
• GraphQL, HTTPS Endpoints, 3rd Party Services, Hosting: canary-qa-global-us-east-1-plink
• Data API, 3rd Party Services: data
• Triggers + Sync: canary-qa-global-us-east-1
• Staging
Triggers: Applicalion-o
• GraphQL: AppWithGraphQL
• Hosting: Application-0
• Hosting + Sync + GraphQL + HTTPS Endpoints + Data API + 3rd party Services:
canary-staging-global-us-east-1
• Prod
• Hosting + Sync + GraphQL + HTTPS Endpoints + Data API + 3rd party Services:
Prod-local-gcp-us-west1
• Triggers: Application-O
• GraphQL: WithGraphQL
"Testing" refers to Ensuring the apps that have an EOL extension are still fully functional. They can
access/view the features listed via the Ul + API + CLI.
